"label": "Personal Income Smoothing Buffer",
"design_principles": "Become your own stabilizer. Interpose a buffer
between volatile income and retirement contributions. Smooth first,

self.",
"core_mechanism": "All gig income flows into a Smoothing Buffer first.
From buffer, a calculated stable monthly amount flows out as Effective
Income. Retirement contributions are % of smoothed Effective Income, not
volatile actual income.",
"how_it_works": "1) Worker opens two linked accounts: Smoothing Buffer +
Retirement. 2) All earnings deposit to Buffer automatically. 3) Algorithm
calculates rolling 6-month average, sets that as monthly Effective Income
outflow. 4) Fixed % of Effective Income auto-transfers to Retirement each
month. 5) Buffer absorbs highs, releases during lows. Worker sees stable
retirement contributions regardless of this months actual earnings. 6) If
Buffer runs low, Effective Income adjusts down gradually, not abruptly.",
"what_is_new": "Not embracing volatility (surge threshold) or pooling with
others (ROSCA). This is INDIVIDUAL smoothing - you become your own bank,
your own stabilizer. Time-shifts your money to create artificial consistency
from real chaos.",
"why_it_works": "Variable earners already mentally smooth income -
spending from savings during dry spells. This formalizes and automates that
intuition. The buffer creates predictability where none exists, enabling
consistent retirement saving without consistent income.",
"why_it_fails": "Requires sufficient cash reserves to seed the buffer
initially. Workers living paycheck-to-paycheck cannot build buffer. Also: if
income drops for extended period (not volatility but decline), buffer
drains completely - smoothing becomes delaying the inevitable.",
"medium_term": "Gig platforms integrate smoothing buffers natively.
Workers choose their smoothing aggressiveness. Financial literacy shifts
from budgeting to buffer management.",
"long_term_vision": "Income volatility becomes invisible layer beneath
financial life. Workers experience stability while reality remains chaotic.
Personal buffers replace employer stability as foundation of financial
planning."

### Result:
Solution: Personal Income Smoothing Buffer
Graph stats: {'nodes': 22, 'edges': 18, 'solutions': 4, 'mechanisms': 3, 'outcomes': 3, 'principles': 3, 'criticisms': 3, 'justifications': 3, 'novelties': 3, 'signals': 0, 'constraints': 0}

solution.label: Personal Income Smoothing Buffer
solution.design_principles: Become your own stabilizer. Interpose a buffer between volatile income and retirement contributions. Smooth first, contribute from the smoothed stream. One person, two accounts, time-shifted self.
solution.core_mechanism: All gig income flows into a Smoothing Buffer first. From buffer, a calculated stable monthly amount flows out as Effective Income. Retirement contributions are % of smoothed Effective Income, not volatile actual income.
solution.how_it_works: 1) Worker opens two linked accounts: Smoothing Buffer + Retirement. 2) All earnings deposit to Buffer automatically. 3) Algorithm calculates rolling 6-month average, sets that as monthly Effective Income outflow. 4) Fixed % of Effective Income auto-transfers to Retirement each month. 5) Buffer absorbs highs, releases during lows. Worker sees stable retirement contributions regardless of this months actual earnings. 6) If Buffer runs low, Effective Income adjusts down gradually, not abruptly.
solution.what_is_new: Not embracing volatility (surge threshold) or pooling with others (ROSCA). This is INDIVIDUAL smoothing - you become your own bank, your own stabilizer. Time-shifts your money to create artificial consistency from real chaos.
solution.why_it_works: Variable earners already mentally smooth income - spending from savings during dry spells. This formalizes and automates that intuition. The buffer creates predictability where none exists, enabling consistent retirement saving without consistent income.
solution.why_it_fails: Requires sufficient cash reserves to seed the buffer initially. Workers living paycheck-to-paycheck cannot build buffer. Also: if income drops for extended period (not volatility but decline), buffer drains completely - smoothing becomes delaying the inevitable.
solution.medium_term: Gig platforms integrate smoothing buffers natively. Workers choose their smoothing aggressiveness. Financial literacy shifts from budgeting to buffer management.
solution.long_term_vision: Income volatility becomes invisible layer beneath financial life. Workers experience stability while reality remains chaotic. Personal buffers replace employer stability as foundation of financial planning.
